title: heliophila glauca
intro: Heliophila glauca, also known as blue mouse tail, is a flowering plant species belonging to the family Brassicaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. Its health benefits include wound healing, anti-aging, and immune system support, making it a popular herbal remedy for various health conditions. Heliophila glauca can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion for its medicinal benefits.
